body_txt: Some offensive moves require the user to stand in place , and then there's the other extreme of attacking while moving full tilt in a direction. Unlike Flash Step , this doesn't always require Super-Speed , which is great for allowing a Mighty Glacier to gain a little bit of speed. A Horn Attack is often preceded by the attacker charging toward the target. A Sister Trope to Sprint Shoes , which may enable this. See also Battering Ram , Deadly Lunge , Foe-Tossing Charge , Rolling Attack , Slide Attack , and Video Game Dashing . Compare Animal Maul Attack , when this is done by animalistic characters.
